ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flashcards" (
  "flashcard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flashcard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the flashcard */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question on the flashcard */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer on the flashcard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the flashcard was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the flashcard was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the flashcard belongs */,
  "difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the flashcard (1-5 scale) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the flashcard (e.g., textbook, website) */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the flashcard is public or private */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Average rating of the flashcard by users */,
  "num_ratings" INTEGER /* Number of times the flashcard has been rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flashcard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flashcards_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES flashcard_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flashcards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the review */,
  "flashcard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flashcard being reviewed */,
  "review_time" INTEGER /* Time spent on the review in milliseconds */,
  "ease" INTEGER /* Ease of recall (1-5 scale) */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval until the next review in seconds */,
  "last_interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the previous review in seconds */,
  "factor" INTEGER /* Learning factor */,
  "review_type" INTEGER /* Type of review (0 for learning, 1 for review) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the review */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the review was performed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., completed, skipped) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the user during the review */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review was performed later than scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_flashcard_id FOREIGN KEY ("flashcard_id") REFERENCES flashcards ("flashcard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "total_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent in the session in seconds */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of flashcards reviewed in the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted (e.g., school, home) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Study environment (e.g., quiet, noisy) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  "is_productive" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the session was productive */,
  "num_breaks" INTEGER /* Number of breaks taken during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is the default role for new users */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission is assigned */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is the default permission for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flashcard_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flashcard_tag_map" (
  "tag_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag mapping */,
  "flashcard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flashcard */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag mapping was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the tag mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flashcard_tag_map_flashcard_id FOREIGN KEY ("flashcard_id") REFERENCES flashcards ("flashcard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flashcard_tag_map_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review history entry */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the review */,
  "ease" INTEGER /* Ease of recall (1-5 scale) */,
  "interval" INTEGER /* Interval until the next review in seconds */,
  "last_interval" INTEGER /* Interval of the previous review in seconds */,
  "factor" INTEGER /* Learning factor */,
  "review_type" INTEGER /* Type of review (0 for learning, 1 for review) */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the review was performed */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., completed, skipped) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments made by the user during the review */,
  "is_late" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review was performed later than scheduled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_history_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
